manual_ref: Web Services Guide Rev D, Table 212 (physicalLibrary/elements)
fidelity_notes: Element coordinates now return the FULL physical object {frame,rack,section,column,row,type} per the Web Services manual (Figure 23), matching ScalarCoordinate — the reduced 3-tuple string is gone. Values (section=bay/module mapping) are the emulator's geometry, not appliance-certified; the STRUCTURE is doc-faithful (see docs/reference/i3-contract-notes.md).
